texto: The rifts in this ancient wall continue to be patched with exhortations to women to avoid challenging the norm even if it means faking orgasm and sacrificing honesty in their intimate relationships with men. In the past we have been willing to pay this price; whether we should continue to do so is question for individuals; not historians, to decide.
explicacao: Orientação direta de Rachel P. Maines sobre temas ligados a reflexao. A afirmação “The rifts in this ancient wall continue to be patched with exhortations to women to avoid challen…” funciona como lembrete prático ligado a reflexao, feminism, history, útil em momentos de history e science.
